subcodes.first_line: O Sadiq! The ornament of the human temple is truthfulness. Blessed is the soul that hath attained thereunto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صادق طراز هیکل انسانی صدق است طوبی از برای نفسیکه بآن
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
